title: Weebacca

{{Quote|There's something not right about that Weebacca.|Han Solo|<ref name="GB" />}}
'''Weebacca''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who tended to get into trouble and who had a habit of [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]]. He was a childhood friend of fellow Wookiee [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. When his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] was [[Devastation of Kashyyyk|invaded]] and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Wookiee dropped his then-current dealings and rushed to fight for the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] defense. Nevertheless, he turned into a double agent for the Empire prior to the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|battle]] to free the planet [[4 ABY/Legends|several years]] later. However, Chewbacca and the ex-smuggler [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], both members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], caught Weebacca trying to escape the destruction of Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Hindane Darcc's]] [[Darcc's Palace|palace]] along with the commanders of the Imperial forces on Kashyyyk, Moff Darcc himself, and the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] enslaver [[Pekt]]. With his treachery revealed, Weebacca was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Chewbacca.

==Biography==
{{Quote|That's one way to deal with Weebacca.|Han Solo, in response to Chewbacca's slaying of Weebacca|<ref name="GB" />}}
Weebacca was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] and a longtime childhood friend of fellow Wookiee and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] native [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Weebacca was always in need of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and had a love for the game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]; it was not long before he got into [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. He dropped contact with his family and Chewbacca for a long [[Time/Legends|time]], but he eventually resurfaced as a runner of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] through the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]] under the nose of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrols. He hated the Empire, and when his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of Kashyyyk was [[Devastation of Kashyyyk|invaded]] and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he dropped his lucrative smuggling career and rushed home to help his people. Nevertheless, Weebacca eventually became an agent for the Empire.<ref name="GB" />

Prior to the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|liberation]] of Kashyyyk from [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] enslavers and the Empire in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="EA" /> Weebacca was destroying a Trandoshan building near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kepitenochan/Legends|Kepitenochan]] when he was spotted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents Chewbacca and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Despite the fact that they appeared to be fighting on the same side, seeing a lone Wookiee unharmed caught Solo's attention due to the [[Devastation of Kashyyyk|carnage]] that had taken place against the Wookiees. Weebacca helped Chewbacca and Solo reoccupy Kepitenochan and rebuild the [[Government Tree]], with which the two New Republic agents hoped to contact the New Republic. However, the Imperials had installed three [[Jammer/Legends|jammers]] that prevented the agents from dispatching a message.<ref name="GB" />

[[File:WeebaccaKilledByChewbacca-SWGB.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Weebacca is killed by Chewbacca.]]
Weebacca claimed that the jammers were to be found in the city of [[Okikuti]] but did not go with Solo and Chewbacca to destroy them. When the New Republic agents and a company of Wookiees investigated the city—where they found no jammers—they were ambushed by Imperials, but Solo and the Wookiees were able to escape. Later, after the Wookiees destroyed Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Hindane Darcc's]] [[Darcc's Palace|palace]], Weebacca tried to escape the planet with Darcc and the Trandoshan enslaver [[Pekt]]—the leaders of the Imperial invasion forces—in an [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial shuttle]]. However, Chewbacca and Solo spotted the Wookiee with the Imperials, and, with Weebacca's betrayal revealed, Chewbacca [[Death/Legends|killed]] Weebacca in a duel while Darcc and Pekt fled.<ref name="GB" />

==Personality and traits==
Weebacca frequently got into trouble, and he was known for his habit of gambling—he particularly loved the game of sabacc. The Wookiee was a friend of Chewbacca during his childhood [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and the two were never cross with each other,<ref name="GB" /> though Weebacca could be untrustworthy and petty at times. When in desperate need of large sums of credits, Weebacca was willing to take any job available, including posts as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]]-for-hire.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|324|Weebacca}}</ref>

Weebacca eventually betrayed the Wookiees by becoming a double agent for the Empire during his home planet's enslavement. He garnered a deep hatred for the Empire early in his life; nevertheless, he eventually joined the Empire prior to the liberation of Kashyyyk. Weebacca also had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and was considered in his clan to be a "small Wookiee with a big Wookiee's attitude."<ref name="GB" /> His name contained that of the ancient Wookiee hero [[Bacca]], the first of the great [[Wookiee Chieftain|chieftains]] of Kashyyyk. In [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]], the name "Bacca" meant "friendly."<ref name="CNOK">{{GamerCite|10|Callsigns: Names of Kashyyyk}}</ref>

==Equipment==
Weebacca sported a pair of [[Ryyk blade/Legends|ryyk blades]] as his main weapons during the battle of Kashyyyk.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|John devised a list of emotions for Larry: Chewie angry, questioning, conversational, etc. We needed a particularly whiny tone for the shifty Weebacca — Larry is threatening to dig up voices from the old holiday special|Reed Knight, in a developer diary published on the Lucasarts website|<ref name="Developer diary">{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/diaries3.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - Designer Diary #3}}</ref>}}
Weebacca was created for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB" /> which was released on [[November 11]], [[2001]].<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref> Prior to his appearance in the game, Weebacca was mentioned in a developer diary by level designer [[Reed Knight]] published on the Lucasarts website on [[August 12]], 2001. He wrote about the process of finding appropriate sound effects for Wookiee characters, with fellow designer [[John Kathrein]] hoping to find a whiny tone suitable for Weebacca. According to Knight, sound designer [[Larry the O]] had threatened to find sound effects from<ref name="Developer diary" /> the [[1978]] television film<ref name="Holiday">''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''</ref>''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''.<ref name="Developer diary" /> In ''Galactic Battlegrounds'', Weebacca appears throughout the second Wookiee campaign, and until his betrayal the player is tasked with keeping him alive and will lose levels immediately should he be killed. He is also a unique unit that can be placed in player-created scenarios.<ref name="GB" />
